name: lumen
description: Lumen — a collaborative online vibe-coding platform. Describe an app in plain words; Lumen writes and runs it live, with your whole team in the room.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm --workspace server run prisma:generate && npm --workspace server run prisma:migrate
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c magenta,cyan "npm --workspace server run dev" "npm --workspace client run dev"
scripts.start: npm --workspace server run prisma:deploy && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm --workspace server run start
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace client run typecheck
